workflow_runs.name: Release
workflow_runs.display_title: fix(windows): fix all remaining MSBuild compile errors and brand-lint…

head_commit.message:
fix(windows): fix all remaining MSBuild compile errors and brand-lint check
- Include BrandPalette.h in MainControlDialog.cpp.
- Fix static method tabPageEventProc accessing non-static member currentTab directly.
- Fix syntax error with else if statement without prior if.
- Declare TrayPopover_Init and TrayPopover_Uninit as extern in AppDelegate.cpp.
- Fix path resolution in gen-palette.py for MindfulKey instead of OpenKey.
- Bump version to 0.4.6.
